NOUN Compass
https://nouncompass.me

Purpose:
- Independent NOUN student-help website
- Plain-language guides for admission, fees, portal tasks, results, study centres, GST, TMA, and student support
- Always directs students back to official NOUN or NELFUND sources for final account-specific confirmation

Priority sections:
- /admission
- /fees
- /portal
- /results
- /student-guides
- /course-materials
- /study-centres
- /tools

High-trust pages:
- /about
- /editorial-policy
- /corrections-policy
- /copyright-policy
- /takedown-policy
- /privacy-policy
- /terms
- /disclaimer

Author and reviewer profiles:
- https://webgrowth.info/victorious/

Editorial stance:
- Independent resource, not an official NOUN property
- Student-help explanations should not override official account records
- Sensitive payment, deadline, admission, registration, and academic-record claims should be checked against official sources

Best starting points:
- /articles/how-to-pay-noun-school-fees
- /articles/how-to-register-noun-courses
- /articles/how-to-check-noun-results
- /articles/how-to-open-your-noun-result-statement-from-the-support-portal
- /articles/how-to-submit-tma-on-noun-elearn
- /articles/nelfund-application-status-meanings-explained
